scope_summary: Develop a terminal-based notepad application using the textual library. The application should feature a TUI with a sidebar listing all notes, a main editor pane for syntax-free text editing, and support for basic CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) on notes. Develop a terminal-based notepad application using the textual library. The application should feature a TUI with a sidebar listing all notes, a main editor pane for syntax-free text editing, and support for creating, editing, saving, removing notes, as well as keyboard shortcuts for common actions

The application should feature a TUI with a sidebar listing all notes, a main editor pane for syntax-free text editing, and support for creating, editing, saving, removing notes, as well as keyboard shortcuts for common actions.

Build a Python CLI tool called 'pyvulncheck' that scans a project's dependencies for known vulnerabilities. The tool should:
1) Parse dependencies from requirements.txt and pyproject.toml (support both formats).
2) Query the PyPI JSON API to resolve package metadata including versions, homepage, sum
